entries.name: Origin
entries: Faeries aren't common in most lands, though they're plentiful enough in the Faewilds. They have a propensity for discovery and adventure, looking for the joy and entertainment in things big and small.

entries.name: Fey Ancestry
entries: You have advantage on saving throws against being {@condition Charmed|XPHB} and cannot be put to sleep by magical means.

entries.name: Flight
entries: Because of your wings, you have a flying speed equal to your walking speed. You can't use this flying speed if you're wearing medium or heavy armor.

entries.name: Quick and Nimble
entries: Your speed and size make you difficult to hit. You gain a +1 bonus to your AC while you are airborne.

entries.name: Tiny
entries: Your size is Tiny, making you easy to move. You have {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on Strength saving throws and Strength-based ability checks.

entries.name: Fairy Magic
entries: You know the {@spell Pixie Sparks|Starlight} cantrip.

Starting at 3rd level, you can cast the {@spell faerie fire} spell with this trait. Once you cast {@spell faerie fire} with this trait, you can't cast it again until you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}. You can also cast the spell using any spell slots you have of the appropriate level.
Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma is your spellcasting ability for these spells when you cast them with this trait (choose when you select this species).

entries.name: Languages
entries: You can speak, read, and write Common, Sylvan, and one other language that you and your DM agree is appropriate for your character.
